The '''Wookiee Slug-Thrower'''{{Fact}} was a model of [[Slugthrower rifle/Legends|slugthrower rifle]] that was mass-produced by [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] workshops across the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] around the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Near the middle of it's body it had multiple cartridges for [[Blaster gas/Legends|blaster gas]].<ref name="VD" /> The weapon was used by various Wookiee warriors during the [[Battle of Kashyyyk/Legends|Battle of Kashyyyk]] at the end of the Clone Wars.<ref name="Ep3" />

*{{Film|III}} {{1st}}
